pending.body: finding_summary: The branch still checks in planner-era final-review snapshots. `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json:33-36` and `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json:73-76`, plus `.ralph-burning/projects/gsp-1/run.json:34-37` and `.ralph-burning/projects/gsp-1/run.json:74-77`, still serialize `final_review_planner` even though `StageResolutionSnapshot` no longer defines that field in `src/contexts/project_run_record/model.rs:186-206` and `build_final_review_snapshot` now only emits reviewers plus arbiter in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8206-8223`. severity: high. affected_files: [".ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json", ".ralph-burning/projects/gsp-1/run.json"]. remediation_hint: Regenerate or scrub the checked-in run snapshots with the current serializer so every persisted final-review snapshot block omits `final_review_planner`.

Stale doc comments in panel_contracts.rs still reference the removed planner role in the final review context. Line 200: '/// Per-amendment vote used by both the planner-position step and reviewer voting.' should be '/// Per-amendment vote used by reviewer voting.' Line 225: '/// Payload returned by the planner-position step and each reviewer voting pass.' should be '/// Payload returned by each reviewer voting pass.' Additionally, diagnostics.rs line 424 comment says '// Full panel resolution for planner + reviewers' but should say '// Full panel resolution for reviewers' since the final review panel no longer includes a planner.

High: `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` now includes legacy planner state in the newly added final-review stage-resolution snapshots at lines `33-36` (`active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner`) and `73-76` (`last_stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner`), despite planner being removed from the final-review panel contract. This creates snapshot-schema drift and re-introduces a stale planner role in new run artifacts. See contract expectation that final-review snapshots should only carry `final_review_reviewers` and `final_review_arbiter`.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
